description: Calibration set 6, 2026-07-03 21:31-21:40 (WOS_BattleReports_FarSeerCalibration_v6.pdf). All Far Seer vs Lv13 Giant Tapir. PANEL CHANGE: Far Seer Lethality rows now +20.0% (was +10.0% in sets 1-5) for all classes - accidental lethality A/B vs set-5 baselines. Heroes: Bradley (marksman card +206.7 -> Marks rows +218.8/+216.8 confirmed again), Renee (lancer card +111.3 -> Lancer rows +123.4/+121.4), Lloyd L~22 (lancer; S1 Bird Invasion L1 'reduces enemy Lethality by 4%'; S2 Iceflare Bomb L1 'every 3 turns: lancers +30% attack, ALL enemy lethality -6% for 1 turn' - tooltips verbatim).

battles.note: 300 T6 lancers solo w/ Renee card+skills; lancer wall dies in ~17.5 turns vs 31 for 300 T7 inf
REQUESTED #1: no-hero 300 T7 baseline. vs set-5 Bradley 300 T7 = 35: 32(new panel)/1.0997(leth) = 29.1 old-panel baseline; 35/29.1 = 1.2028 = Bradley multiplier 1.2034 CHECK
24 = 26(T2-1000 vs MUSK set1) x0.70(Musk->Tapir wall) x1.0997(leth panel) x1.2034(Bradley) = 24.1 EXACT
Lloyd offensively inert for infantry: 21 = 24/1.2034 x rounding
GRAND COMPOSITION CHECK: 177 x 1.10(leth panel) x 1.2034(Bradley) x 1.052(Lloyd duration ext) = 246.4 vs observed 246

key_findings: LETHALITY IS ~LINEAR: panel leth x1.0909 (1.10->1.20) -> kills x1.0997 (three probes: 300 T7 32 vs 29.1; T2 chain; 1000 T7 grand check). Elasticity ~1.0-1.1.
ENEMY-LETHALITY DEBUFF EXTENDS SURVIVAL ~LINEARLY: Lloyd EV -6% enemy leth -> duration 57.5 -> 60.5 (+5.2%) - incoming damage ~linear in attacker lethality too.
T2 WALL DURATIONS: 300 -> ~9.5-10 turns, 1000 -> ~17.5. T7/T2 survival ratio 3.26 = own DxH ratio 3.43 (within clock granularity) -> Defense and Health enter SURVIVAL as a ~linear PRODUCT.
DUAL CLOCKS AGREE in same battle (Lloyd every-3 x Bradley every-4): clock method validated.
Lloyd offensively inert for pure-infantry armies (S2 lancer attack has no lancers; S1/S2 leth debuffs are defensive).
MULTIPLICATIVE COMPOSITION VALIDATED END-TO-END: kills = baseline x panel-leth x hero-skills x duration-extension, exact to integer rounding.

REMAINING PUZZLE: A and L are each LINEAR at the margin, but across tiers per-turn output scales like (A*L)^~0.44, not A*L - a large tier-linked suppressor remains unidentified (same puzzle as solo-vs-mixed dealer factor). This is now THE open question.
